meaning: Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals,英国动物保护协会
examples: The SPCA helps animals to find new homes.
The SPCA CARES for animals in many countries.
People can come to the SPCA and choose a pet.
The Scottish SPCA said a sting from the scorpion would be sore but not deadly.
The Scottish SPCA said the rabbit - now named Misty - must have been "extremely frightened".
